marathon.name: Missile Toe
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Missile Toe! I'm a sweet girl that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm a sweet girl that is quite shy when you first meet me. Once you get to know me you will see I'm just a complete lovebug and will cuddle with you forever! I'd be best in a home without small children as loud noises and fast movements really scare me. If you think you can provide a home for me then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Conundrum
marathon.bio: Believe me honey, I was just as surprised as you to learn that an adorable and happy guy like ME could end up at the shelter as a stray. But I'm livin', breathin' proof that life takes you the places you least expect and when it does, there are good things waiting for you. They call me Conundrum and I'm hoping to call you mine. I'm social, friendly, affectionate, adorable, gentle...the list of good qualities goes on and on. I'm just waiting for someone like YOU to scoop me up and make my life the best it has ever been. See you soon?

marathon.name: Honey
marathon.bio: I heard ya'll were looking to grow your family by four paws and I'm hoping to be the lucky dog you choose. I'm a high energy girlie who is playful, curious and downright adorable. I'm social with other dogs but will need my food, treats and high value items kept separate. I'm looking for an active lifestyle with adventure around every corner and in return I'll love you like no dog ever has. Wanna shake on it?

marathon.name: Knox
marathon.bio: All around me are dogs who are at different stages of acclimating to shelter life; some are brave and make it look easy and some are just trying to right the world that has been turned upside down. Here's the thing, I'm having a hard time. The people I used to love, the dog I used to be, the life I used to know; all of that's gone and I've had to start over new. I tell you this so that you know to take things slow and give me grace when we meet; I've never had to do this before. I'm a loyal and independent girl who would prefer to be the only pet in a quiet household. I need only a few things but very consistently; food/water, love and exercise. Maybe you too have been through a difficult time and felt misunderstood? I'm hoping you're the person who can give me everything that I need and that I may return the favor, too.Less

marathon.name: Fortune *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: My name is Fortune and if you ask me, I'd say your luck is about to change. I'm the mother in a mother/daughter pair and we're hoping to find our new home together; it's all we've ever known. Sure, we have our tiffs and don't always see eye to eye, but family is all you have in this world and we'll always have each other's backs. I like to keep my circle small and am a little hesitant when it comes to meeting new people but I know that in order to get out of the shelter, I have to get out of my shell. I can be social with other dogs when I'm one on one but may be a little more stand-offish when Buttercup is around. I'm not interested in sharing my home with cats and I have had some interaction with children. I struggled to adjust to the shelter when I first got here and I'm sure there'll be a few growing pains in the process of meeting and moving in with a new family, but I'm going to try my hardest to be brave, bold and beautiful.Less

marathon.name: Nonia
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Nonia! I'm a sweet little lady that is here at HSMC looking for a new home! I'm very outgoing, sweet and ready to be YOURS! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Lacy
marathon.bio: WOOF! I'm Lacy! I'm a happy go lucky girl that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. You may remember me as Diamond, but I go by Lacy now. Things just didn't pan out for me in my last home - so now I'm back and ready to find my forever family! I'm active, playful and ready to learn all of the things! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Finneas *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: Meow my name is Finneas and I'm here with my sister Billie and I guess you could say that we're quite the famous pair. We're both extremely talented, down to earth and good looking, too. What more could you ask for in a pair of cats?

marathon.name: Siridean
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Siridean! I'm a sweet girl that made her way to HSMC as a stray. But, I know I'll soon be leaving with my forever family! I'm petite, adorable and ready to move in with you! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Jake
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Jake! I'm looking for a new place to call my home! I'm a quiet guy that takes a little bit of time to warm up to you but soon we will be best of friends! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Franklin
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Franklin! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new forever family. I'm a great cat that loves other cats and would be a purrfect fit in just about any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Hedgewitch
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Hedgewitch! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC as a stray. When I first got here I was oh so scared of everything and everyone but HSMC staff helped me see that people are not all that bad. I'm still very shy with new people, but I know with a proper chance I can find the purrfect forever home for me!

marathon.name: Road Trip
marathon.bio: My name is Road Trip. I am ready to hit the road on my way to the rest of my life. I came in with a litter of kittens that have all moved on, so I am officially an empty nester. I would like to enjoy the rest of my time with a new family cuddling and lounging around. Would you like to take an adventure with me? Come visit me at the shelter.

marathon.name: Yugi
marathon.bio: HI there, I'm Yugi! I'm a handsome guy that is waiting for YOU to come adopt ME! I'm active, loving and super soft! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Bandita
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Bandita! I'm a super adorable gal that is here and ready to be adopted into my forever home! I'm a great cat that gets along well with other cats and would be a purrfect fit in just about any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Ivy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Ivy! I'm a fun loving girl that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm very playful, adorable and ready to be YOURS! Come see me soon!

marathon.name: Kee Kee
marathon.bio: I am searching for my forever home! I'm a sweet girl that loves treats, playing with fun cat toys and having a nice warm sunspot to snooze in! I can be a little shy until I get to know you, but we will soon be the very best of friends! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Billie *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: They call me Billie but I'm no bad guy. I'm currently crashing at HSMC until my chance to shine arrives, and I'm thinking my best chance will look a lot like YOU! I'm here with my brother Finneas and yeah, you may have heard about us. It sure would be great to have my brother at my side for all that life has to offer. So what do you say? Two is better than one!

marathon.name: Mia
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Mia! I'm a sweet girl that was surrendered to HSMC due to no fault of my own. There were just too many of us felines in the home! I'm a quiet girl that loves attention and would make an excellent fit in just about any home! I'd be a great fit in a home with other cats as well! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Thia
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Thia! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC after being found as a stray. I'm a very loving girl that loves people and that would be a purrfect fit in any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Paddy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Paddy! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new family to call my own. I'm quite the funny guy, always getting into some sort of trouble and making the staff laugh. I love to be around people and would love a family that has lots of time for me. Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Countdown
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Countdown! I'm a sweet boy that came to HSMC as a stray. I'm a very friendly guy that loves people and would be a purrfect fit in any home. I love attention and would make an excellent snuggler in any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Coven
marathon.bio: Coven here! I was a scared little kitten caught in a live trap and brought to HSMC. I slowly learned that humans are okay and I can learn to trust them. I think I am now ready to find my home with humans. I need someone who understands that I am scared and I will take time to learn to trust. I will do best in a calm and quiet home without young children. If you think you have the time and patience to allow a shy girl like me to come around, then come and visit me!

marathon.name: Spiderman
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Spiderman! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call my home! I'm very talkative, and I absolutely love people! I'd be great in a home where I'm getting ALL of the attention! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Tilly
marathon.bio: Hellooo there! My name is Tilly and if I had to choose three words to describe myself I'd pick FUN, FRIENDLY and FABULOUS. I'm a growing gal with dreams to chase and when it comes to love, I'm ready to dive in with all four paws. I'm great at making friends, wagging my tail and turning your frown upside down. I can't wait to be a part of your family and take up space in your world; I know you'll be the most important part of mine!

marathon.name: Patch
marathon.bio: Hey there, my name is Patch! I made my way to HSMC as a stray and unfortunately my human never called about me, I was sad for a little bit, but time to move on and find a home for myself. I am a happy and excited boy and ready for anything! I love other dogs, but I have energy and might be a little bit much for some dogs. I would love an active home where I get to go out on long walks or hikes. What do you think? I am the kind of guy you are looking to add into your home?

marathon.name: Mancala
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Mancala! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home! I'm a lovely guy that enjoys snacks, rolling around having fun in the sun and just being around people! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Red
marathon.bio: The name is Red and a few short months ago my world was in chaos; the ground unstable beneath my paws and the future uncertain. I've done a complete 180 and can finally see the light, and you, at the end of the tunnel I'd found myself in. I've got all four paws on the ground and I'm a whole new dog, ready for a whole new life. I'm a Dutch Shepherd/Belgian Malinois mix which basically means, this ain't just any rodeo. I've got a strong mind, body and will and I'm not a dog for just anybody. I'm loyal to a fault, hard working and have a mind that's all my own. I'm social with other dogs and ready for a job to do; a walk around the block doesn't come close to cutting it for me. I'm determined and I'm proud. Failure isn't an option and I won't give up.

marathon.name: Mr. Red
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Mr. Red and boy am I ready for you to adopt me! I'm a happy guy that loves people and would love to go home with you! I'm outgoing, playful and ready to be YOURS!

marathon.name: Sand
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Sand! I'm an active gal that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call my own! I love to be held and would love a family that has lots of time to play with me! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Sea
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Sea! Are you ready to seas the day and adopt me? Well, you should! I'm a fun loving gal that is very friendly and sweet. I enjoy climbing around and checking out new things! If you think a cool pet like me could be the one for you come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Short Rib
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Short Rib! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC waiting for you to adopt me! I'm a playful guy that loves my toys and would be a very fun addition to any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Boppy
marathon.bio: I'm just a shy girl living in a big world hoping someone will have the time and patience for little ol' me. They call me Boppy and it pains me to say it but I've bopped around between a few homes before landing here at the shelter. I'm nervous around new people and overwhelmed in new environments and would not do well around young children. I find great confidence in the company of other dogs and am trying my very best to be brave. I can't wait to fall in love and keep all four feet on solid ground with you.

marathon.name: Jake
marathon.bio: I'm Jake, I came to HSMC to find a new home. This isn't my first rodeo, I have been in a couple different homes. I am just trying to find my perfect match. I will do best in a home without young children. I have previously lived with cats but I might do best as the only pet in the home, I like to be the center of attention! Come on, who doesn't want it to be all about them? I will do best in a home that doesn't have a lot of activity from people outside of the home, it makes me uncomfortable with all these strangers coming into my home. Don't get the wrong idea though! I enjoy time with my family, I am affectionate and goofy, I like to play with toys and I know tricks. What do you think? Do you have a quiet home that is in need of a four legged friend?

marathon.name: Faith
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Faith! I'm a cute little hamster that is here looking for a new place to call home. We're super cute and ready to go home with you!

marathon.name: Pablo
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Pablo! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm active, playful and super loving so you should come meet soon! I've lived with another cat before and done well so I think I could again! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Princess
marathon.bio: Woof! My name is Princess and I'm a girlie with quick wit and the bluest eyes this side of the Mississippi. I'm social with other dogs but do not want to share high value items. I see cats as prey and not as friends so a feline-free home would be best for me. I'm independent but sweet and looking to be out of the shelter and into your home. Have you been searching for a girl like me?

marathon.name: Emmie
marathon.bio: Be honest, have you ever seen a happier gal?! My name is Emmie and things are finally starting to look up for me. Life on the streets was pretty lonely and uncertain. I didn't have a place to call home or humans to call my family; I didn't want to get close to anyone and always had my guard up. Coming to the shelter helped me tear down all of the walls I had spent months building; even I don't recognize the dog I used to be. And now that I've healed myself, I'm ready to love you. My age is as golden as my coat and I'm looking for a quiet retirement home that never runs out of head scratches, keeps the treat jar full and tells me I'm beautiful every single day. I'm ok to share my home with a low key dogs or cats and hoping that you will make the rest of my life, the best of my life.Less

marathon.name: Terracotta
marathon.bio: HI there, I'm Terracotta! I'm a sweet girl that is here at HSMC as a stray. I'm a great cat that loves attention but can be a little shy until I get to know you! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Wovey
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Wovey! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC as a stray, but I won't be here for much longer! When you first meet me you might think me meek and mild, but once you get to know me I'm full of pep and energy! I love to run around playing with tennis balls and getting the zoomies - so expect to be kept on your toes! If you think a wild girl like me could bring joy into your home then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Soul
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Soul! I'm a loving girl that is here to spin you a tune and make you love me. And you wanna know a fun fact about me? I have NO tail! Yep, that's right, I have no tail whatsoever aren't I so special? I'm a great cat that loves people and am super snuggly. Come visit me soon at the City of Schofield Municipal Center!

marathon.name: Buttercup *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: Hellllooooo out there! My name is Buttercup and there are a few things you should know before you fall in love with me. 1. I'm a package deal- I was surrendered to the shelter with my mom and when I leave here, I'm taking her with me. 2. I tend to be a little on the dramatic side and am not afraid to cause a scene. 3. Cats are not my friends, I cannot go to a home with cats. 4. This is the face that could be greeting you every time you come home...

marathon.name: Princess
marathon.bio: Hi humans! My name is Princess. I thought I had a forever home but it just wouldn't stick so I'm back in these kennels once again. Here's what you should know- I'm a sweet and playful girl who deserves the forever kind of love. It's looking like I'll be happiest as the only dog in the home and the jury is still out when it comes to me having any future friendships with cats. I think we'll have to learn the rest about each other as we go- are you in?!

marathon.name: Willa
marathon.bio: They call me Willa and tell me that I'm a special girl who deserves the world, but my troubled past makes me doubt that's true. I was on my own for at least 2.5 weeks before getting trapped and brought to the shelter; it's hard to go through something like that and not have trust issues. Getting to the adoption floor has been a long time coming and I'm thankful for the staff who got me here but I'm ready for bigger and better things with someone who's love is true and won't give up when the going gets tough. I love wide open spaces, water, fetch, jolly balls and the wind in my fur. Once I know and trust you, you'll see the side of me that gets lost in the stress of the shelter and the uncertainty of a constantly changing environment. I don't love other dogs and I don't give my heart away easily but I promise I'm worth the time and the energy. (Oh and breed experience is a big plus in my book!)Less

clark.name: Harvey
clark.bio: Meet Harvey! Harvey came to CCHS from a local farm earlier this August. This handsome Heeler mix is just about a year old and weighs roughly 41.6lbs currently. Harvey is a shining pup with a smile to match! He is as sweet as can be, though he can start out a little timid at times. Harvey is a smart guy, just waiting to figure out all of life's puzzles and snufflemats! He would benefit from an active furever home that can help burn some of that remaining puppy energy! Harvey gets a little nervous around small children and would much prefer a home with older children that know how to respect his space. While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% your newest front seat co-pilot! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Harvey today!

clark.name: Willow
clark.bio: Meet Willow! Willow came to CCHS as a stray from the Loyal area towards the beginning of August. This sweet gal is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 48.3lbs currently. Willow is an absolute sweetheart! She can be a little on the timid side, as coming into a shelter setting can be quite daunting to some pups, but with a few treats, positive encouragement, and a whole lotta forehead kissies and she will warm up in no time! Willow is currently working on her leash manners as she can tend to get a little excitable when she catches a new scent! She would benefit from having a patient furever family that is willing to meet her where she is at with all of her little quirks! Willow would also benefit from being the only dog in her furever home as she can have a bit of anxiety around other dogs. While we may not be entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she's 100% a good girl! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Willow today!

clark.name: Cleo
clark.bio: Meet Cleo! Cleo came to CCHS as a stray towards the beginning of September from the Neillsville area, before being adopted out for a short time and brought back for, well, being a dog! This happy Husky is about 5 1/2 years old and weighs roughly 58.8lbs currently. Cleo is the biggest cuddle buddy you could ask for! She loves to be by your side through any adventure you may have to endure! Her only fault is that she sheds a little too much, but what husky doesn't! Cleo is quite the communicator! In typical Husky fashion, she is not afraid to voice her thoughts and feelings! While she knows how to get along with other dogs, she's a little picky when it comes to who she considers a bestie. Cleo would make an excellent addition to just about any family but would most likely do better with older kids. With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Cleo today!

clark.name: Herman
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Thelma (Bonded w/Louise)
clark.bio: Meet Thelma! Thelma came to CCHS with her sister Louise as strays from the Pittsville area towards the very end of November. This cheeky feline is about 16 weeks old (estimated DOB 9/29/26) and weighs roughly 4.1lbs currently. Thelma is a bit of a sheepish gal with a lot of love to give! She takes a little bit to warm up, but once you get her purring it's nearly impossible to get her to stop! Thelma is quite bonded to her sister Louise and feels much more confident and comfortable by her side! These two sweet gals would love to go into their furever home together to show just how beautiful their personalities can blossom when given the patience to grow! Both Thelma and Lousie are currently residing in our Kitty City with a multitude of other feline friends. Apply for Thelma (&Louise) today!

clark.name: Louise (Bonded w/Thelma)
clark.bio: Meet Louise! Louise came to CCHS with her sister Thelma as strays from the Pittsville area towards the very end of November. This bashful feline is about 16 weeks old (estimated DOB 9/29/25) and weighs roughly 3.1lbs currently, Louise is a shy gal who finds a lot of comfort by her sister, Thelma's side! These two sweet gals are nearly inseparable and would love to go into their furever home together to show just how beautiful their personalities can blossom when given the patience to grow! Both Louise and Thelma are currently residing in our Kitty City with a multitude of other feline friends. Apply for Louise (& Thelma) today!

clark.name: Bart
clark.bio: Meet Bart! Bart came to CCHS with his 7 siblings towards the very end of December from a local farm. This lively Heeler mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 10.5lbs currently. Bart is such a goofball! He can be a little awkward in his approach but he's hoping his adorable looks can distract you from that! While we aren't entirely certain what hos exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Silly Goose! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success to the pup. Apply for Bart today!

clark.name: Darla
clark.bio: Meet Darla! Darla came to CCHS as a stray from the township of Fremont earlier this January. This pretty Red Heeler is about a year and a half old and weighs roughly 35.2lbs currently. Darla is an absolute ray of awkward sunshine! She is such a smart gal but didn't quite grasp onto the social skills so she hopes you can look past her being a bit forward with her affection! Darla is a tad protective of her food, so she'd prefer being the only dog in the home to avoid her anxiety around sharing. With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Darla today!

clark.name: Pinkie Pie
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Bobby
clark.bio: Meet Bobby! Bobby came to CCHS with friends and litter mates after they were born on a horse farm and there were way too many kitties to keep. The family brought them inside and raised them in their sunroom with lots of love and affection. They were handled by people, including children, from little on. As a result they are the most loving and wonderful kitties. It was super hard for the family to bring them to CCHS, but they knew it was for the best for them to find new homes. Bobby is now 5 months old (estimated DOB 8/27/25) and weighs 4.9#. He's very handsome with his short-haired Orange Tabby coat. If you're looking for a wonderful new kitty (or two!), please consider Bobby and apply to adopt him today!

clark.name: Ginger Spice
clark.bio: Meet Ginger Spice! Ginger Spice came to CCHS with her 3 sisters towards the middle of January from a local farm at just 5 weeks old. This pretty Cattle Dog mix is now 13 weeks old and weighs roughly 7.6lbs currently. Ginger Spice did manage to post bail and get adopted, however after some health complications arose with the adopter in that very short week, they felt it best to bring Ginger Spice back to hopefully find a home that can keep up with her! Ginger Spice may be on the petite side, but she has a booming personality to make up for it! She is a confident little being that has no fear in the world and is ready to scare off any danger that may come your way! While we aren't certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Smol! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Ginger Spice today!

clark.name: Tia
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Tamara
clark.bio: Meet Tamara! Tamara came to CCHS with her sister Tia as strays from the Loyal area earlier this February. This darling gal is about 9 weeks old and weighs roughly 9.4lbs currently. Tamara is a little bit of a bashful gal! She isn't always certain that she wants to make new friends, but she always ends up loving anyone who shows her attention anyhow! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Cutie-Patootie! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Tamara today!

clark.name: Patsy
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Willie
clark.bio: Meet Willie! Willie came to CCHS with his mom and 3 brothers towards the very end of February from a local farm. This dapper Terrier mix is about 11 weeks old and weighs roughly 7.2lbs currently. Willie is a true snugglebug! He would love nothing more than to stay curled up on a lap and snooze the day away! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Your Country Boy! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Willie today!

clark.name: Hank
clark.bio: Meet Hank! Hank came to CCHS with his mom and 3 brothers towards the very end of February from a local farm. This dashing Terrier mix is about 11 weeks old and weighs roughly 6.9lbs currently. Hank is a handsome little guy with a whole lotta fire and love in his heart that he is just itching to spread! He loves to snuggle but he can often get distracted by his own shenanigans, so having a lap to stay on helps keep this cutie outta trouble! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Born to Boogie! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Hank today!

clark.name: Daisy Mae
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Patty
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Domino
clark.bio: Meet Domino! Domino came to CCHS as a stray from the Spencer area towards the beginning of March. This handsome, 4-year-old, Domestic Short Hair is dressed to the nines in his darling Tuxedo coat, weighing roughly 10.1lbs currently. Domino is a sweet loverboy! He can be a tiny bit bashful at first but will gladly be anyone's friend in exchange for some treats! Domino is currently residing in our front office. Apply for Domino today!

clark.name: Thomas
clark.bio: Meet Thomas! Thomas came to CCHS as a stray from the Longwood area earlier this March. This dashing Hound mix is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 58.1lbs currently. Thomas is an absolute lover! He loves to soak up all of the attention he can possibly get, and with a face like that, who could resist?! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Handsome Man! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Thomas today!

clark.name: Oscar
clark.bio: Meet Oscar! Oscar came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner had unfortunately passed. This handsome mixed breed is about 2 years old and weighs roughly 61lbs currently. Oscar is s total goofball! He admittedly will do just about anything to be told he's a good boy! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% North American House Hippo! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Oscar today!

clark.name: Lucky
clark.bio: Meet Lucky! Lucky came to CCHS with his sister Clover towards the beginning of March from a local farm. This bashful Black Lab mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 23.0lbs currently. Lucky is a little bit of a shy guy! He isn't entirely certain what to make of people, or other dogs, or anything really, but he is determined to investigate everything as thoroughly as possible! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Sherlock Holmes Understudy! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Lucky today!

clark.name: Duke
clark.bio: Head back to the Petfinder home page or use the menu above. You can also contact us if you think you've reached this page in error.

clark.name: Bailey
clark.bio: Meet Bailey! Bailey came to CCHS as an owner surrender when a sudden life change occurred and the owner was left with too many dogs. This handsome mixed breed was originally adopted out at just a few months old and now is standing tall at 1 year and 8 months old, weighing roughly 46.4lbs currently. Bailey is a bit of a goofball! He's been known to get along well with dogs, kids, and cats, enticing them into friendship with his silly shenanigans! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Town Jester! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Bailey today!

clark.name: Clover
clark.bio: Meet Clover! Clover came to CCHS with her brother Lucky towards the beginning of March from a local farm. This beautiful Black Lab Mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 30.4lbs currently. Clover has such a bright personality! She loves to be where the people are and will try to climb in any lap that will let her sit! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Wiggling Snugglebug! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Clover today!

clark.name: Percy
clark.bio: Meet Percy! Percy came to CCHS as a stray from the Longwood area towards the beginning of March. This sweet Hound mix is about 6 months old and weighs roughly 50.5lbs currently. Percy is a total ham! He has a goofy personality and a love for giving kisses! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% Happy to be Involved! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Percy today!

clark.name: Sally
clark.bio: Meet Sally! Sally came to CCHS as an owner surrender when a sudden life change occurred and the owner was left with too many dogs. This bashful Aussie mix was originally adopted out at just a few months old and is now about 1 year and 5 months old and weighs roughly 27.7lbs. Sally is a little bit of a shy gal! She knows how to get along with anyone and everyone, but she does need to check her syllabus over twice before she'll lose the side eye. While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Skeptical Burnt Croissant! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Sally today!

clark.name: Furrguson
clark.bio: Meet Furrguson! Furrguson came to CCHS as an owner surrender towards the beginning of March. This sweet guy is about 3 years and 9 months old and weighs roughly 13.1lbs currently. Furrguson is a bit of a bashful boy! He takes a little time to warm up, but once he is he has no problem showing affection! This sweet guy is currently residing in our Kitty City with our other free-roaming cats. Apply for Furrguson today!

adams.name: Buddy
adams.bio: Meet Buddy: professional grump face, certified sweetheart. At just 1.5 years old, Buddy has perfected the art of looking mildly inconvenienced while secretly being an absolute softie. He’s cat-friendly, enjoys a peaceful vibe, and prefers to seek out affection on his own terms. Not much of a toy enthusiast, but give this guy a sunny spot and he’ll happily clock in for a full day of sunbathing. Low maintenance, high charm. Buddy is on the hunt for a comfy home where he can lounge, love, and judge you just a little (affectionately, of course).Less

adams.name: Maisie
adams.bio: Meet Maisie This 2-year-old tabby is a certified social butterfly! She absolutely will make herself at home in your lap, your heart, and probably your business, too. Maisie is as sweet as they come, a professional snuggler, and always down for a little playtime when the mood strikes. She’s got that perfect mix of affectionate and independent. She’d do great with other kitties who know how to mind their own business and coexist like civilized adults (read: stay in their own lane). If you’re looking for a cat who brings love and a lot of personality, Maisie is ready to move in and run your house (lovingly, of course)!Less

adams.name: Hallie
adams.bio: This beautiful kitty is at the shelter waiting to go to her forever home. Treats are the way to this lady's heart! To make an appointment to meet here, please email felinecaninefriends80@gmail.com. ##1076334##

adams.name: Foster application ONLY
adams.bio: Do you want to make a difference??? Want to help save em...one wag at a time??? For the entire month of January we want to pre approve fosters and fosters to adopt. We plan to get applications approved so we can have fosters waiting for dogs we save then we plan to pull a bunch in feburary. To do this we need people who can be patient and wait for their foster to apply! What is expected from a foster u ask? to Pick up your foster which would either be near mauston or the dells. to bring your foster to vet appointments that we make. (We try to have it so they dont need any further vetting before coming up but sometimes they do) be willing to do meet and greetings with potential adopters (after we approve them) we pay for all of their vetting While some of our fosters will take care of their food, We will provide food if needed pictures! We love updated pictures and posts! It helps to let people know about their personalities and find them forever homes other then that we just want you to show them love! we are always available for questions and to be a support system to our fosters we are starting to offer a foster starter pack that you get when they get their first pup. We havent finalized what will be in this yet, but we are thinking bowls, leash and collar, toys, treats, a kennel (kennel will need to be returned if you decide to no longer foster) While we understand that some people can only do small dogs, or that there may be breed restrictions. we do try to accommodate th

adams.name: Hesther
adams.bio: Hesther arrived with her sisters, she can at first be a bit shy but it doesnt take her long to come around. She loves to give headbutts and loving nudges to all the cats in the playroom with her. She enjoys to be pet once she gets to know you. Hesther is currently at Feline Friends in Westfield. Contact us to see if she's a good fit for your family! She is bonded with her sister Henna. ##2019928##

adams.name: Seafood Department
adams.bio: Seafood Department is a sweet, shy boy that would love to come home and be your lap kitty! Seafood is quiet, but once he's comfortable and trusts you, he will make sure you know that he would like to be pet - thoroughly and frequently and on-demand! Seafood loves to roll and show his tummy when he's getting the real good scratches, and if you're not too greedy, he'll let you get just a bit of tummy rubs in before he cuts you off. Seafood would do best in a slow-paced, quiet home where he can become comfortable and confident. We're unsure of how he is with cats or dogs, however we believe he would adjust fine to other animals who of a similar temperament and energy level - slow and steady!Less

adams.name: Athena
adams.bio: You might remember Athena. She’s the runner. The one who stayed loose for weeks. The dog everyone rooted for. And somehow… she’s still here. Athena is not a “dog park dog,” and she’s not looking for a house full of other dogs. What she is looking for is her person—or her family. Athena is AMAZING with people and kids. She bonds deeply, loves attention, and truly thrives when she’s with her humans. She’s affectionate, loyal, and wants nothing more than to be included in your day. The honest part (because honesty matters): dog selective, she is getting better with other dogs! Excellent with people Wonderful with kids Loyal, affectionate, and loves her humans Athena has been overlooked again and again—not because she’s lacking, but because she needs to be the only dog. And that’s okay. Some dogs don’t want roommates. Some dogs want a family. Athena has survived being on the run, lymes disease, being scared, and being unsure who to trust. What she deserves now is stability, consistency, and someone who chooses her—fully. Located in Wisconsin Please share. Athena already fought hard for her life—she shouldn’t have to fight for a home too. ##2571746##Less
